title: Accenture is an excellent place to kick off your career The company offers great training programs and plenty of opportunities to build your skills before taking on client work I felt well prepared and confident going into projects thanks to the structured learning paths and hands on support The work culture was also a big plus my seniors were supportive approachable and respectful which made a huge difference when I was just starting out The benefits package was competitive compared to other companies and I always felt like I was being treated fairly and professionally

of the few of the organization's 800 000 employees who gets picked seemingly at random for a raise each year ok that note you're also not allowed to laterally change jobs into other roles or departments unless you're on the same project for at least twelve months you can be working for eleven the project is cut and suddenly you're benched and your timer for promotion or a new job is reset much there is no sales coach and no software trainer on the team everyone has to learn and teach each other the managers on site do their best to stop dissent by ending the at least daily meetings tickets to the client for faulty software your kpi and metrics can literally change monthly i've had four different immediate managers in the last year and i have yet to meet a single person in their so they don't have to there are people who have worked for the company for 4-10 years who run obvious circles around others but get passed over for promotions and pay raises because they aren't buddy buddy with the management structure there have been multiple lawsuits brought against this company for discrimination refusal to pay overtime and favoritism the company has won only a single lawsuit title: Joining the IT consultant industry can be both exhilarating and daunting and choosing a firm like Accenture can greatly enhance your career trajectory Accenture offers a unique opportunity for new consultants to network with peers and mentors fostering connections that are crucial for professional growth The company s vast reach and diverse portfolio provide an unmatched gateway into various industries granting exposure to key stakeholders across multiple sectors This experience is both inspiring and intimidating as you navigate the complexities of high profile client engagements One of the notable aspects of client work at Accenture is its remote nature This flexibility allows consultants to collaborate with clients from across the globe leveraging digital tools and platforms to deliver impactful solutions The emphasis on remote work not only broadens the scope of projects you can undertake but also encourages the development of skills in virtual communication and collaboration In summary starting your career at Accenture as an IT consultant is a remarkable experience that offers extensive learning opportunities industry exposure and the chance to engage with top professionals in various fields It is a journey that promises personal and professional growth setting a solid foundation for a successful career in the IT consulting industry
pros: joining the it consultant industry can be both exhilarating and daunting and choosing a firm like accenture can greatly enhance your career trajectory accenture offers a unique opportunity for new consultants to network with peers and mentors fostering connections that are crucial for professional growth the company s vast reach and diverse portfolio provide an unmatched gateway into various industries granting exposure to key stakeholders across multiple sectors this experience is both inspiring and intimidating as you navigate the complexities of high-profile client engagements one of the notable aspects of client work at accenture is its remote nature this flexibility allows consultants to collaborate with clients from across the globe leveraging digital tools and platforms to deliver impactful solutions the emphasis on remote work not only broadens the scope of projects you can undertake but also encourages the development of skills in virtual communication and collaboration in summary starting your career at accenture as an it consultant is a remarkable experience that offers extensive learning opportunities industry exposure and the chance to engage with top professionals in various fields it is a journey that promises personal and professional growth setting a solid foundation for a successful career in the it consulting industry
cons: however it is essential to acknowledge that the management style at accenture can sometimes feel condescending and unhelpful the company's culture tends to place consultants in a continuous state of evaluation where they are tested and then positioned according to their skills this approach can be both a blessing and a challenge on one hand it pushes you to learn and grow in areas where you may be lacking on the other hand it can be overwhelming especially when management is too preoccupied with their own tasks to provide adequate training when guidance is available it often feels rushed and comes from managers already burdened with their workloads this dynamic can lead to long hours and working weekends as you strive to acquire the necessary skills to excel while the learning opportunities are invaluable the time and energy required to meet expectations can be daunting in conclusion while the journey at accenture promises remarkable growth and exposure it is also accompanied by significant challenges balancing the rigorous demands of the job with personal growth requires resilience and a proactive attitude by navigating these hurdles you will emerge as a well-rounded professional ready to thrive in the demanding world of it consulting
